reviews.comment:
Hace 25 años que cargo en esta YPF y siempre con la mejor onda los empleados.  En verano se forma cola inevitablemente con la llegada del turismo así que solo hay que armarse de un poco de paciencia o ir en horario de menos concurrencia.

(Translated by Google)
I've been filling up at this YPF station for 25 years, and the employees are always very friendly. In the summer, there's inevitably a queue with the influx of tourists, so you just need to be patient or go during off-peak hours.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNIdHFXMkRBEAE

reviews.comment:
Cada año que visito Mar del Plata voy a Miramar y cargo combustible en esta YPF  ya que no hay otra la atención es buena el único problema que tenes que hacer fila y a veces se domora porque no ponen más playeros para la atención. Después todo perfecto.

(Translated by Google)
Every year when I visit Mar del Plata, I go to Miramar and fill up at this YPF station because there's no other option. The service is good; the only problem is that you have to wait in line, and sometimes it gets very long because they don't have enough attendants. Otherwise, everything is perfect.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURiN3NxQUxBEAE
